about.title: About ChartingPath
about.subtitle: Empowering traders worldwide with professional tools, education, and technology to achieve consistent success in financial markets.
about.missionP1: To democratize access to professional-grade trading tools and education, enabling traders of all levels to make informed decisions, manage risk effectively, and achieve their financial goals through systematic and data-driven approaches.
about.missionP2: We believe that with the right tools, knowledge, and support, anyone can become a successful trader. Our mission is to break down the barriers to entry and provide world-class resources that were once available only to institutional traders.
about.visionP1: To become the world's most trusted platform for retail traders, recognized for innovation, education excellence, and unwavering commitment to our users' success across all global markets.
about.visionP2: We envision a future where every trader has access to institutional-quality tools and knowledge, creating a more level playing field in financial markets and fostering a global community of informed, disciplined, and successful traders.
about.valuesSubtitle: These principles guide everything we do and shape our service to traders worldwide
about.excellenceDesc: We strive for excellence in every tool, feature, and piece of content we create. Our commitment to quality ensures you receive professional-grade resources that deliver real value.
about.educationFirstDesc: Knowledge is power in trading. We prioritize comprehensive education, providing clear explanations, practical examples, and continuous learning opportunities to help you grow as a trader.
about.transparencyDesc: We believe in complete transparency. From our pricing to our methodologies, we're upfront about everything. No hidden fees, no false promises – just honest, straightforward service.
about.innovationDesc: Markets evolve, and so do we. We continuously innovate, incorporating the latest technology and trading methodologies to keep you at the cutting edge of market opportunities.
about.communityDesc: Trading doesn't have to be lonely. We foster a supportive community where traders can learn from each other, share insights, and grow together in their trading journey.
about.globalAccessibilityDesc: We serve traders worldwide, regardless of location or experience level. Our platform is designed to be accessible, inclusive, and valuable to traders across all markets and time zones.
about.commitmentDesc: Whether you're taking your first steps in trading or you're an experienced professional, ChartingPath is committed to providing you with the tools, knowledge, and support you need to succeed. We're not just a platform – we're your partner in the pursuit of trading excellence.
about.disclaimerP1: ChartingPath provides tools and educational content for informational purposes only. We do not provide investment advice, and all trading involves risk.
about.disclaimerP2: Past performance does not guarantee future results. Always conduct your own research and consider your risk tolerance before making any trading decisions.

pricingPage.headline: Plans for every level of ambition
pricingPage.subheadline: Scan 1,100+ instruments across S&P 500, Crypto, Forex & Commodities. Start free, upgrade when you're ready.
pricingPage.outcomeProofDesc: We auto-capture real trade outcomes. See actual win rates per pattern—not backtested estimates.
pricingPage.proFeaturesDesc: Full backtesting and alerts from $12/mo. Comparable platforms charge $80–$250/mo for similar depth.
pricingPage.patternFirstDesc: Focused on what matters: detecting, validating, and acting on chart patterns across 8,500+ instruments.
pricingPage.flexibleBillingDesc: All subscriptions auto-renew. Cancel anytime from your account settings—access continues until the end of your billing period. Annual plans are refundable within 14 days of payment.

faq.upgradeQ: How does upgrading without payment work?
faq.upgradeA1: You can upgrade your annual subscription at any time with no extra transactions needed. All remaining days of your current plan will be automatically converted into equivalent value days on the new tier. You don't lose anything, just use the remaining amount to switch to a better version. Thus, the remaining period of your subscription will be reduced and your next payment date will be switched.
faq.upgradeA2: If you downgrade, your current plan will stay exactly as it is until its subscription date. Then, once it expires, your new downgraded plan will go live at the selected rate.
faq.upgradeA3: Remember, it's not a free trial. Once upgraded, there will be no option to revert this action. However, you'll be able to set a downgraded plan for the next billing period.
faq.cancelA1: You can cancel your subscription anytime and it will not auto-renew after the current paid term. Paid service will remain active for the duration of the paid term.
faq.cancelA2: A canceled trial will stop immediately after cancellation.
faq.scriptLibQ: What's included in the Script Library?
faq.scriptLibA: Ready-to-use trading scripts for Pine Script (TradingView), Python (MT4/MT5), and MQL5. Each script includes setup instructions, backtesting results, and customization guides.
faq.refundA1: Refunds are available for annual plans only and must be requested within 14 calendar days of payment. To request a refund, contact our support team.
faq.refundA2: There are no refunds for upgrades to a more expensive plan, monthly plans or market data, even if the subscription is cancelled on the same day as the payment has gone through.
faq.refundA3: Please note that users who filed a chargeback/dispute request or a claim are not eligible for a refund.
faq.platformQ: What platforms do your scripts work with?
faq.platformA: Our scripts are compatible with TradingView (Pine Script), MetaTrader 4/5 (Python & MQL), and most major trading platforms.
faq.billingQ: How do plan upgrades affect billing?
faq.billingA: When you upgrade to a higher tier, we automatically calculate the prorated difference and apply your remaining subscription value to the new plan. Your billing cycle adjusts accordingly, and you'll see the updated next payment date in your account.
faq.refreshQ: How often is pattern data refreshed?
faq.refreshA: Data refresh rates depend on your plan tier and the timeframe you're analyzing:
faq.refreshDaily: Updated every 24 hours for all 8,500+ instruments
faq.refresh4h: Updated every 4 hours for all 8,500+ instruments
faq.refresh1h: Updated hourly for Core 1,100 instruments; every 8h for extended universe
faq.refresh15m: Updated every 15 minutes for Top 300 most liquid instruments
faq.refreshNote: Higher refresh rates for intraday data require significant API resources. Premium tiers get priority access during high-traffic periods.

pricingPage.disclaimerEducational: Monthly plans are non-refundable. Annual plans are refundable for unused full months. Lifetime is refundable within 1 month of purchase. See Terms & Privacy for details.
pricingPage.disclaimer: Educational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Trading involves substantial risk of loss. All scripts and strategies should be thoroughly tested before live trading.

tradingCopilot.headline: The Only AI That Can Actually
tradingCopilot.subtitle: Not a generic chatbot. A purpose-built AI with live market access, proprietary data, and direct integration with your trading tools.
tradingCopilot.challengeSubtitle: Same prompt. Very different results. Here's what happens when you ask a real trading question.
tradingCopilot.moatSubtitle: Six capabilities that are impossible to replicate by pasting a chart into ChatGPT, Gemini, or any generic AI.

moat.livePatternDbDesc: The Copilot calls search_patterns to scan 8,500+ instruments across stocks, forex, crypto, and commodities for active pattern setups — in real-time, on closed candles.
moat.livePatternDbCant: ChatGPT has no live market data access. It cannot scan instruments or detect patterns.
moat.backtestAtlasDesc: Ask "what actually works?" and get real statistics from our proprietary dataset of 320,000+ historically validated pattern trades with win rates, expectancy, and R-multiples.
moat.backtestAtlasCant: No public AI has access to this proprietary dataset. Generic AI can only cite textbook estimates.
moat.chartContextDesc: Send your actual chart directly from the platform — indicators, support/resistance levels, RSI, MACD, ATR are all read with full precision. No screenshots needed.
moat.chartContextCant: ChatGPT can only OCR uploaded screenshots, losing indicator precision and context.
moat.pineScriptDesc: The Copilot generates ready-to-use trading scripts with the exact pattern, symbol, timeframe, and entry/exit levels pre-filled from your current analysis context.
moat.pineScriptCant: ChatGPT generates generic templates without your specific market context or parameters.
moat.selfImprovingDesc: copilot_learned_rules auto-patches known errors at runtime — correcting unit conversions, improving pattern recommendations, and adapting to market regime changes without code deploys.
moat.selfImprovingCant: ChatGPT is a static model. It cannot learn from market outcomes or correct domain-specific errors.
moat.actionBridgingDesc: Every response includes deep links to Pattern Lab validation, Edge Atlas stats, alert creation, and script export — turning insights into executable actions in one click.
moat.actionBridgingCant: No external AI can link into ChartingPath's integrated tool ecosystem.
